attempts.insight: presentationTilde opacity blocks IsFinite discharge; separately Presentation.quasicoherentData route times out at typeclass (20000 heartbeats) on (sheafToPresheaf (J.over X)).IsRightAdjoint. Off critical path anyway (gap is the reverse direction).

attempts.code_tried: theorem free_isFreeMod (Λ : Type u) : IsFreeMod (SheafOfModules.free (R := X.ringCatSheaf) Λ) := ⟨Λ, ⟨Iso.refl _⟩⟩
attempts.insight: axiom-clean {propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}. Connective lemma: every Presentation's generators/relations are SheafOfModules.free, so this bridges Mathlib presentations to project IsFreeMod/IsLFP.

attempts.strategy: Epi form: extract generators/relations epimorphisms directly

attempts.goal_before: ∃ K G (_:IsFreeMod K)(_:IsFreeMod G)(g:G⟶M)(_:Epi g)(k:K⟶kernel g), Epi k
attempts.insight: axiom-clean. Captures the same free-presentation content cheaply via Epi; exactly what 1.4 consumes on affine charts. Parameterized by P like tilde_of_presentation — independent of the blocked globalization.
